data.title: Allogene Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Business Update
data.description: Allogene Therapeutics, Inc., based in South San Francisco, shared their latest updates on March 12, 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq as ALLO, specializes in advancing allogeneic CAR T (AlloCAR T) products for cancer and autoimmune disease treatment. Their financial report covered the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig Mexico Shortlisted in The Legal 500 Mexico Awards 2026
data.description: In Mexico City on March 12, 2026, Greenberg Traurig's office has been selected as a finalist in 10 categories for The Legal 500 Awards 2026. The firm has received recognition across various practice areas, with individual attorneys also receiving nominations. This achievement reflects their exceptional performance in the legal industry.

data.title: Eutelsat: Termination of Capacity Contracts on Express AT1 and AT2 Satellites
data.description: Paris - Eutelsat (ISIN: FR0010221234 - Euronext Paris / London Stock Exchange: ETL) has officially terminated its contracts for capacity on the RSCC-operated Express AT1 and AT2 satellites. The decision came in response to the unsuccessful operation of RSCC’s Express AT1 satellite positioned at 56° East, alongside the scheduled repositioning of the Express AT2 satellite from 140° East. Eutelsat had originally secured capacity leases on these satellites, marking a significant change in its satellite services strategy.

data.title: Avicena Launches the World’s First microLED Optical Interconnect Evaluation Kit for AI Infrastructure Innovators
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, Avicena introduced the LightBundle™ eKit - the industry’s premier evaluation platform for microLED optical interconnects. This innovative product utilizes ASIC-based transceivers with integrated LED, photodetector (PD), and micro-lens arrays connected through a multi-core fiber bundle. It is designed to cater to the needs of hyperscalers, AI accelerator manufacturers, high-bandwidth memory (HBM) providers, networking firms, and AI infrastructure developers. The platform offers an opportunity to explore cutting-edge optical connectivity technologies for next-generation applications.

data.title: Walmart Names Erin Nealy Cox as Chief Legal Officer
data.description: Erin Nealy Cox has been appointed as the new Executive Vice President of Global Governance, Chief Legal Officer (CLO), and Corporate Secretary at Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ: WMT), headquartered in Bentonville, Arkansas. She is set to assume her new role on April 13, 2026. The company's President and CEO expressed confidence in Cox's ability to lead Global Governance efficiently due to her extensive experience in challenging environments, emphasizing the importance of her leadership for a company as vast and intricate as Walmart.

data.title: Element U.S. Space & Defense and Leonardo DRS Strike Strategic Agreement to Expand Critical EMI Testing Capabilities for U.S. Navy Systems
data.description: Element U.S. Space & Defense (EUSSD) from Belcamp, Maryland, has partnered with Leonardo DRS from Menomonee Falls, Wisconsin to enhance electromagnetic testing for U.S. Navy electronic systems. The collaboration aims to boost capabilities in defense testing and engineering services. EUSSD is known for its expertise in this field, and the new semi-anechoic lined facility they've developed is set to revolutionize testing processes. This innovative venture is expected to significantly elevate the efficiency and accuracy of electromagnetic testing within the U.S. Navy, marking a milestone in defense technology advancement.

data.title: SEABOURN INTRODUCES THE DENALI EXPERIENCE, EXTENDING ALASKA VOYAGES INTO THE HEART OF DENALI NATIONAL PARK IN 2027 AND 2028
data.description: Luxury cruise line Seabourn has announced a new offering called "The Denali Experience" for 2027 and 2028. Passengers can now opt for an eight-day pre-cruise Seabourn Journey, extending their Alaska voyages. This package includes immersive experiences in Denali National Park and other locations. The program aims to enhance travelers' expeditions by providing unique opportunities for exploration. The Seabourn Journey is set to offer passengers unforgettable adventures before embarking on their luxury cruise.

data.title: Binance secures legal win in Alabama court, with judge ordering plaintiffs to amend complaint or risk dismissal.
data.description: A judge approved a request by Changpeng Zhao, but directed the plaintiffs in the lawsuit against Binance to submit an additional complaint, warning of potential dismissal if they fail to do so.
U.S. TREASURY SECRETARY BESSENT, WHEN ASKED IF RISING COSTS WOULD EVER LEAD HIM TO TELL PRESIDENT TRUMP THE WAR IS NO LONGER AFFORDABLE, FIRMLY RESPONDED "ABSOLUTELY NOT," ACCORDING TO SKY NEWS.

data.title: Solect Energy Details How Rooftop Solar Site Leases Create Long-Term Revenue for Commercial Property Owners
data.description: Property owners in Providence, Rhode Island, can explore alternative revenue streams through rooftop solar site leases offered by Solect Energy. These leases enable commercial and industrial property owners to generate consistent income from their unused rooftop space. By leveraging this overlooked asset, property owners can secure long-term, contractually guaranteed earnings. This initiative presents an opportunity for owners to boost net operating income and optimize asset performance without any upfront investment. Solect Energy's article sheds light on this promising income-generating option for property owners in the region.

data.title: Disrupting Women's Hormonal Health: How Aspect Health is Dismantling PCOS Dogma
data.description: In the healthcare industry, millions of women continue to receive symptom-masking medication instead of receiving comprehensive solutions. Oleg Kovalev, the Chief Marketing Officer at Aspect Health, is shedding light on this prevalent medical issue. Aspect Health has emerged as the leading provider in women's hormonal health solutions, offering a proactive approach to addressing this issue.

data.title: Crude Oil Drops Below $80 After Tanker Escort Claim — Then Rebounds As US Walks It Back (UPDATED)
data.description: Update: Following the announcement by U.S. Department of Energy Secretary Chris Wright that the U.S. Navy safely guided an oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz, crude oil prices experienced a significant drop. Although Wright's statement about President Trump ensuring energy stability during military actions against Iran was retracted, uncertainty lingers in the energy market. West Texas Intermediate crude, monitored by the United States Oil Fund (NYSE: USO), fell below $80 per barrel in New York by 1:26 p.m., a decrease of almost 33% from the recent peak of $119. This sudden reversal reflects one of the most notable fluctuations in oil markets seen since... (For full story, visit Benzinga.com)

data.title: Ward Blake Architects Earns Multiple National Honors for Design Excellence
data.description: Ward Blake Architects, based in Jackson Hole, Wyoming, has received several recent awards for its site-specific designs. The firm, known for its innovative and sustainable approach, has been recognized for its commitment to excellence in architecture. These accolades highlight the firm's dedication to creating unique and environmentally friendly structures.
